parsed.production_notes: The video is entirely AI-generated. The human character exhibits uncanny smoothness, unnatural micro-expressions, and slightly desynchronized lip movements typical of AI video avatars. The robot character is a clear digital render.

characters.appearance: Young Asian woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has dark hair styled in a tight, high bun. Her facial features are smooth and symmetrical.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid, light pink hooded sweatshirt throughout the video.
characters.demeanor: Engaged, slightly hesitant when answering questions, but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a smooth, glossy white face and head casing. It has glowing blue eyes and exposed metallic, mechanical joints in the neck area.
characters.wardrobe: None, it is a bare robotic shell.

scenes.setting: Abstract, out-of-focus background with soft gray and white tones. Bright, even lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young Asian woman and a white humanoid robot face each other in a tight profile shot. The woman, positioned on the right, wears a pink hoodie and has her dark hair in a high bun. The robot, on the left, features a smooth white face, metallic neck joints, and glowing blue eyes. They are positioned very close, maintaining eye contact as if in a deep conversation. The background is a soft, blurred gradient of light grays and whites, keeping the focus entirely on the two figures. The lighting is bright and flat, illuminating both faces clearly.

scenes.visual_description: A single-panel shot showing a woman and a robot facing each other in profile against a blurred background. Text overlays appear sequentially between them as they speak.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Quy tắc đầu tiên để học tiếng Anh là gì? [What is the first rule to learn English?]
Character B says: Đừng học, hãy sử dụng nó! Bạn chỉ cần nói chuyện với người bản ngữ thôi! [Don't study, use it! You just need to talk to native speakers!]
Character A says: Bằng cách nào? [How?]
Character B says: Với Learna AI. [With Learna AI.]
scenes.on_screen_text: QUY TẮC ĐẦU TIÊN ĐỂ HỌC TIẾNG ANH LÀ GÌ? (WHAT IS THE FIRST RULE TO LEARN ENGLISH?) ĐỪNG HỌC HÃY SỬ DỤNG NÓ! (DON'T STUDY USE IT!) BẠN CHỈ CẦN NÓI CHUYỆN VỚI NGƯỜI BẢN NGỮ THÔI! (YOU JUST NEED TO TALK TO NATIVE SPEAKERS!) BẰNG CÁCH NÀO? (HOW?) VỚI LEARNA AI (WITH LEARNA AI)

scenes.setting: Top: Abstract dark background. Bottom: Cozy room with a bookshelf and warm lamp.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of a white humanoid robot's head and upper chest. The robot has smooth white facial plating, glowing blue eyes, and visible metallic mechanics in its neck. It is positioned centrally against a dark, almost black background. Faint, glowing white concentric circles radiate outwards from behind the robot's head. The robot's mouth is slightly open.

A young Asian woman sits in front of a black studio microphone on a stand. She wears a pink hoodie and her hair is tied in a high bun. She looks slightly upwards and to the left, holding one hand near her chest in a thoughtful gesture. The background is a softly lit room featuring a bookshelf filled with various books. A warm, glowing lamp provides cozy, ambient lighting to the scene.

scenes.visual_description: A horizontal split-screen. The top panel shows the robot avatar against a dark background with radiating sound wave graphics. The bottom panel shows the woman in a cozy room speaking into a microphone. Subtitles appear over the respective panels as they converse.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: Umm.. I have 22. [Umm.. I have 22.]
Character B says: Bạn muốn nói: "I'm 22?", đúng không? [You mean: "I'm 22?", right?]
Character A says: À đúng rồi, là 'I'm 22'. [Ah right, it's 'I'm 22'.]
Character B says: Linh, where are you from? [Linh, where are you from?]
Character A says: Uhh... I am Vietnam. [Uhh... I am Vietnam.]
Character B says: Linh, cố gắng tốt đấy, nhưng em phải nói: "I am from Vietnam". [Linh, good effort, but you have to say: "I am from Vietnam".]
Character A says: Xin lỗi, em hay nhầm lắm. I am from Vietnam. [Sorry, I often make mistakes. I am from Vietnam.]
Character B says: Không sao đâu, chúng ta sẽ cải thiện tiếng Anh bằng cách luyện nói mỗi ngày cùng nhau nhé. [It's okay, we will improve English by practicing speaking every day together.]

À đúng rồi, là 'I'm 22' Linh, where are you from I am Vietnam Linh, cố gắng tốt đấy, nhưng em phải nói: "I am from Vietnam" Xin lỗi, em hay nhầm lắm. I am from Vietnam Không sao đâu, chúng ta sẽ cải thiện tiếng Anh bằng cách luyện nói mỗi ngày cùng nhau nhé.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, dark blue gradient background. The color transitions smoothly from a slightly lighter blue in the center to a darker shade at the edges. There are no characters, props, or environmental details present.

scenes.visual_description: A static end card with a dark blue gradient background. A large app icon is centered, with promotional text above it and app store download buttons below.
